meta.topic: Acute ischemic stroke thrombolysis and thrombectomy complications

questions.topic: Acute ischemic stroke thrombolysis and thrombectomy complications

stem.en: Review the client record and answer the unfolding stroke case-study items.
stem.zh: 查看患者病历，并回答这个逐步展开的卒中病例题。

title.en: Acute ischemic stroke with tPA eligibility evaluation in a patient on warfarin
title.zh: 服用华法林患者的急性缺血性卒中与 tPA 适用性评估

summary.en: A 68-year-old man with atrial fibrillation on warfarin presents 45 minutes after last known well with sudden aphasia, right-sided weakness, and left gaze preference. The case follows alteplase eligibility screening, thrombectomy preparation, and post-reperfusion deterioration.
summary.zh: 一名 68 岁男性有房颤并长期服用华法林，最后正常后 45 分钟出现突发失语、右侧无力和向左凝视偏斜。本病例追踪 alteplase 适用性筛查、血栓取出术准备，以及再灌注后病情恶化。

content.en:
History: 68-year-old man with hypertension and atrial fibrillation. Home medications include amlodipine 10 mg daily, metoprolol 50 mg twice daily, and warfarin for stroke prevention. Anticoagulation clinic INR five days ago was 2.3. Wife witnessed sudden onset; EMS documented last known well 45 minutes before ED arrival. No prior stroke, recent surgery, known bleeding disorder, or prior intracranial hemorrhage.

Presentation: awake and attentive, looking to the left. Produces only single words or short effortful phrases with paraphasic errors; cannot reliably repeat sentences. Follows simple commands with the left side but does not move the right arm or right leg to command. Wife reports he dropped a coffee cup with the right hand and could not form words.
content.zh:
病史：68 岁男性，有高血压和房颤。家庭用药包括 amlodipine 10 mg 每日一次、metoprolol 50 mg 每日两次，以及用于预防卒中的 warfarin。抗凝门诊 5 天前 INR 为 2.3。妻子目击症状突发；EMS 记录最后正常时间为到达急诊前 45 分钟。无既往卒中、近期手术、已知出血性疾病或既往颅内出血。

表现：清醒且能注意周围，但眼睛看向左侧。只能说单个词或短促费力的短语，并有语义错用；不能可靠复述句子。能用左侧肢体完成简单指令，但不能按指令移动右臂或右腿。妻子报告他右手掉落咖啡杯，且无法组织语言。

content.en:
Vital signs: T 36.8 °C, HR 88/min irregularly irregular, BP 188/104 mmHg; repeat manual BP 186/102 mmHg, RR 16/min, SpO2 98% on room air. Weight 92 kg.

Neurologic examination: forced left gaze preference, expressive aphasia, right lower facial droop, right arm no movement against gravity, right leg trace hip movement with drift to bed within 5 seconds, diminished light touch on the right arm and leg, right Babinski sign. Left arm and leg have full strength. Pupils equal, round, reactive to light at 3 mm. NIHSS 14.

Other assessment: irregularly irregular rhythm; lungs clear; abdomen soft and nontender; skin warm and dry without bruising or petechiae; peripheral pulses symmetric; no signs of head trauma.

Stat results: INR 1.8, PT 21.4 seconds, aPTT 34 seconds, platelets 188,000/µL, glucose 142 mg/dL, creatinine 1.0 mg/dL, hemoglobin 14.1 g/dL, troponin I <0.01 ng/mL.

Non-contrast CT head: no intracranial hemorrhage, no early ischemic changes, no midline shift.
content.zh:
生命体征：T 36.8 °C，HR 88 次/分且绝对不规则，BP 188/104 mmHg；手动复测 BP 186/102 mmHg，RR 16 次/分，室内空气 SpO2 98%。体重 92 kg。

神经系统检查：强迫性向左凝视偏斜，表达性失语，右下脸下垂，右臂不能抗重力活动，右腿髋部仅有轻微活动并在 5 秒内下垂至床面，右臂和右腿轻触觉减退，右侧 Babinski 征阳性。左臂和左腿肌力正常。双瞳孔等大等圆，对光反应存在，直径 3 mm。NIHSS 14。

其他评估：心律绝对不规则；双肺清；腹部软、无压痛；皮肤温暖干燥，无瘀斑或瘀点；外周脉搏对称；无头部外伤迹象。

急查结果：INR 1.8，PT 21.4 秒，aPTT 34 秒，血小板 188,000/µL，血糖 142 mg/dL，肌酐 1.0 mg/dL，血红蛋白 14.1 g/dL，troponin I <0.01 ng/mL。

头颅非增强 CT：无颅内出血，无早期缺血改变，无中线移位。

title.zh: 阶段 1：到达急诊后 0–30 分钟

content.en: Stroke team is activated. CT is negative for hemorrhage. Stat INR is 1.8. The client is approximately 75 minutes from last known well. BP remains 186/102 mmHg. Per the institutional acute stroke protocol, IV alteplase is contraindicated when the INR exceeds 1.7 at the time of intended administration. The neurologist states the client is not a candidate for IV alteplase because of the INR and orders CTA head and neck to evaluate for large-vessel occlusion and potential mechanical thrombectomy. Neurologic examination remains NIHSS 14 with right hemiplegia and expressive aphasia.
content.zh: 卒中团队已启动。CT 未见出血。急查 INR 为 1.8。患者距离最后正常约 75 分钟。BP 仍为 186/102 mmHg。根据本机构急性卒中流程，计划给药时 INR 超过 1.7 时禁用 IV alteplase。神经科医生说明患者因 INR 不符合 IV alteplase 条件，并医嘱行头颈 CTA，以评估是否有大血管闭塞及机械取栓可能性。神经系统检查仍为 NIHSS 14，有右侧偏瘫和表达性失语。

title.zh: 阶段 2：到达急诊后 30–90 分钟

content.en:
CTA shows complete left MCA M1 occlusion with robust collateral flow. CT perfusion shows a large ischemic penumbra with a small infarct core. Neurointerventionalist agrees the client is a candidate for mechanical thrombectomy. Wife holds durable power of attorney and provides consent because the client cannot provide informed consent due to aphasia.

Provider order: start IV nicardipine at 5 mg/hr and titrate to the institutional pre-thrombectomy BP threshold, commonly ≤185/110 mmHg. After 20 minutes, BP is 168/94 mmHg. Client remains NPO. Two patent IV lines are in place. Continuous cardiac monitoring is active and the stroke flow sheet is current.
content.zh:
CTA 显示左侧 MCA M1 段完全闭塞，侧支循环良好。CT 灌注显示大范围缺血半暗带、梗死核心较小。神经介入医师同意患者符合机械取栓条件。由于失语导致患者无法知情同意，持有医疗持久授权的妻子代为同意。

医嘱：IV nicardipine 5 mg/hr 起始，并滴定至本机构取栓前血压阈值，通常为 ≤185/110 mmHg。20 分钟后 BP 为 168/94 mmHg。患者继续 NPO。已有两条通畅静脉通路。持续心电监护已连接，卒中流程记录已更新。

title.en: Stage 3: 2–4 hours after ED arrival, post-thrombectomy
title.zh: 阶段 3：到达急诊后 2–4 小时，取栓后

content.en:
Mechanical thrombectomy is successful. Angiography confirms restored flow in the left MCA, TICI 2b/3. On neuro-ICU arrival: T 37.1 °C, HR 82/min irregularly irregular, BP 156/88 mmHg on nicardipine 5 mg/hr, RR 14/min, SpO2 98% on 2 L nasal cannula. Post-procedure provider order: maintain systolic BP below 180 mmHg for the first 24 hours.

Neurologic status has improved: the client produces two- to three-word phrases with effort, follows two-step commands, and briefly lifts the right leg off the bed before it drifts down. Right arm remains plegic. Right facial droop persists but is less pronounced. NIHSS is 9. Pupils are equal and reactive. Warfarin is held. No anticoagulants or antiplatelet agents have been administered. Orders include neuro checks every 15 minutes for 2 hours then every 30 minutes for 6 hours, BP monitoring every 15 minutes during nicardipine titration, right femoral groin-site checks every 15 minutes for 2 hours, strict NPO until dysphagia screen, and repeat non-contrast CT in 24 hours or sooner for any neurologic deterioration.
content.zh:
机械取栓成功。血管造影确认左侧 MCA 血流恢复，TICI 2b/3。到达神经 ICU 时：T 37.1 °C，HR 82 次/分且绝对不规则，BP 156/88 mmHg，nicardipine 5 mg/hr 输注中，RR 14 次/分，鼻导管 2 L/min 下 SpO2 98%。术后医嘱：前 24 小时维持收缩压低于 180 mmHg。

神经状态已有改善：患者能费力说出 2–3 个词的短句，能执行两步指令，右腿可短暂抬离床面后下垂。右臂仍瘫痪。右侧面瘫仍在但较轻。NIHSS 为 9。瞳孔等大且对光反应存在。Warfarin 暂停。未给予抗凝或抗血小板药。医嘱包括：前 2 小时每 15 分钟神经检查，随后 6 小时每 30 分钟；nicardipine 滴定期间每 15 分钟测 BP；右股动脉穿刺部位前 2 小时每 15 分钟检查；吞咽筛查前严格 NPO；24 小时复查非增强 CT，若有任何神经恶化则提前复查。

title.en: Acute deterioration 45 minutes after neuro-ICU arrival
title.zh: 到达神经 ICU 后 45 分钟急性恶化

content.en: The client becomes drowsy, stops following commands, and verbal output ceases. Left pupil is now 5 mm and sluggishly reactive; right pupil remains 3 mm and briskly reactive. BP 174/96 mmHg. HR 72/min regular. Right groin dressing is clean, dry, and intact with no hematoma.
content.zh: 患者变得嗜睡，不再遵循指令，也不再发声。左瞳孔现为 5 mm、对光反应迟钝；右瞳孔仍为 3 mm、对光反应灵敏。BP 174/96 mmHg。HR 72 次/分且规则。右腹股沟敷料清洁、干燥、完整，无血肿。

title.zh: 阶段 4：急诊 CT 后的处理
确认出血与稳定处理医嘱

content.en:
The nurse immediately notifies the neurointerventionalist and neurology team. Emergent non-contrast CT head shows a 3 cm left frontoparietal intraparenchymal hemorrhage with surrounding edema and 4 mm left-to-right midline shift. Provider gives a stat order to titrate nicardipine to maintain systolic BP below 140 mmHg. Neurosurgery is consulted. Client is intubated for airway protection; GCS is 7. Wife is updated by the attending neurologist and goals-of-care discussion is initiated.

Repeat labs: INR 1.6, hemoglobin 12.8 g/dL, platelets 174,000/µL. Provider orders IV vitamin K 10 mg and four-factor prothrombin complex concentrate for residual warfarin effect. Head of bed is elevated to 30 degrees. Seizure precautions are in place. Continuous ICP monitoring is being arranged.
content.zh:
护士立即通知神经介入医师和神经科团队。急诊头颅非增强 CT 显示左额顶叶脑实质内出血 3 cm，周围水肿，并有 4 mm 左向右中线移位。医师紧急医嘱滴定 nicardipine，使收缩压维持低于 140 mmHg。已会诊神经外科。患者因保护气道需要已插管；GCS 为 7。主治神经科医生已更新妻子并开始讨论治疗目标。

复查实验室：INR 1.6，血红蛋白 12.8 g/dL，血小板 174,000/µL。医师医嘱 IV vitamin K 10 mg 和四因子凝血酶原复合物，以逆转残余 warfarin 作用。床头抬高 30 度。已采取癫痫预防措施。正在安排连续 ICP 监测。

questions.topic: Acute ischemic stroke thrombolysis and thrombectomy complications

stem.en: At Stage 1, classify each assessment finding as consistent with the suspected left MCA stroke syndrome or normal/unrelated to that syndrome.
stem.zh: 在阶段 1，将每项评估发现分类为符合疑似左侧 MCA 卒中综合征，或属于正常/与该综合征无关。

rows.en: Right arm and right leg weakness, with the arm more affected
rows.zh: 右臂和右腿无力，且右臂受累更重
表达性失语并伴复述受损

rows.en: Irregularly irregular heart rhythm with atrial fibrillation history
rows.zh: 心律绝对不规则且有房颤病史

rows.en: Full strength in the left arm and left leg

rows.zh: 到达时双侧 3 mm 瞳孔等大且对光反应存在

rows.en: Clear lung sounds and normal troponin
rows.zh: 肺音清且肌钙蛋白正常

columns.en: Consistent with left MCA stroke/cardioembolic mechanism
columns.zh: 符合左侧 MCA 卒中/心源性栓塞机制

columns.en: Normal or unrelated to this stroke syndrome
columns.zh: 正常或与该卒中综合征无关

correct.en: Right hemiplegia, expressive aphasia, right lower facial droop, and left gaze preference localize to a dominant left MCA cortical stroke. Atrial fibrillation and sudden onset support a cardioembolic mechanism. Intact left-sided strength, initially equal reactive pupils, clear lungs, and a normal troponin do not explain the focal left MCA syndrome.
correct.zh: 右侧偏瘫、表达性失语、右下脸下垂和向左凝视偏斜定位于优势半球左侧 MCA 皮质性卒中。房颤和突发起病支持心源性栓塞机制。左侧肌力完整、初始瞳孔等大且有反应、肺音清和肌钙蛋白正常，不能解释这个局灶性左侧 MCA 综合征。

byChoice.en: Contralateral motor weakness, especially arm-predominant weakness, fits MCA motor-cortex involvement.
byChoice.zh: 对侧运动无力，尤其上肢更重，符合 MCA 运动皮质受累。

byChoice.en: Expressive aphasia with impaired repetition is a dominant-hemisphere cortical sign.
byChoice.zh: 表达性失语伴复述受损是优势半球皮质受累表现。

byChoice.en: Right lower facial droop fits a left cortical motor lesion affecting the contralateral lower face.
byChoice.zh: 右下脸下垂符合左侧皮质运动区病灶影响对侧下脸。

byChoice.en: Acute gaze preference toward the left fits involvement of the left frontal eye field.
byChoice.zh: 急性向左凝视偏斜符合左侧额眼区受累。

byChoice.en: Atrial fibrillation is a major risk factor for cardioembolic stroke and supports the mechanism, even though it is not a focal neurologic deficit.
byChoice.zh: 房颤是心源性栓塞性卒中的重要危险因素，支持该机制；但它本身不是局灶神经缺损。

byChoice.en: Normal strength on the left is expected because the left MCA lesion produces right-sided motor findings.
byChoice.zh: 左侧肌力正常是预期的，因为左侧 MCA 病灶产生右侧运动表现。

byChoice.en: Equal reactive pupils on arrival are not part of the initial MCA ischemic syndrome; later pupil asymmetry would be a deterioration cue.
byChoice.zh: 到达时瞳孔等大且有反应不是初始 MCA 缺血综合征的一部分；之后出现瞳孔不对称才是恶化线索。

byChoice.en: Clear lungs and a normal troponin are useful baseline findings, but they are not findings of the left MCA stroke syndrome.
byChoice.zh: 肺音清和肌钙蛋白正常是有用的基线资料，但不是左侧 MCA 卒中综合征的表现。

testTakingStrategy.en: Localize neurologic findings first. Cortical signs such as aphasia and gaze preference help distinguish a large-territory stroke from unrelated normal assessment data.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 先定位神经系统发现。失语和凝视偏斜等皮质体征有助于把大血管供血区卒中与无关的正常评估资料区分开。

glossary.defZh: 供应外侧大脑半球的重要动脉，受累时常出现对侧脸臂无力和语言障碍。
理解相对保留但说话费力、词语错误或无法流利表达的语言障碍。
眼睛偏向一侧，急性大脑半球卒中时常偏向病灶侧。

questions.topic: Acute ischemic stroke thrombolysis and thrombectomy complications

stem.en: At Stage 1, the CT shows no hemorrhage, last known well was about 75 minutes ago, BP is 186/102 mmHg, and the stat INR is 1.8. Use the institution's alteplase protocol stated in the chart.
stem.zh: 在阶段 1，CT 未见出血，最后正常约 75 分钟前，BP 为 186/102 mmHg，急查 INR 为 1.8。请使用病历中说明的本机构 alteplase 流程。

clozeStem.en: The nurse should recognize that IV alteplase is {{1}} because the decisive contraindication is {{2}}. The nurse should promptly {{3}}.
clozeStem.zh: 护士应识别 IV alteplase {{1}}，因为决定性禁忌因素是 {{2}}。护士应立即 {{3}}。

options.en: contraindicated at this time
options.zh: 此时禁用

options.en: indicated because the CT is negative
options.zh: 因 CT 阴性而适用

options.en: delayed until the clinic INR from five days ago is repeated
options.zh: 需等待重复 5 天前门诊 INR 后再决定

options.en: the current INR of 1.8 exceeds the institutional threshold
options.zh: 当前 INR 1.8 超过本机构阈值

options.en: the blood pressure is above 180 systolic
options.zh: 收缩压高于 180

options.en: the client took warfarin this morning regardless of the INR
options.zh: 无论 INR 如何，患者今晨服用了 warfarin

options.en: communicate the stat INR and support the pivot to CTA/thrombectomy evaluation
options.zh: 报告急查 INR，并协助转向 CTA/取栓评估

options.en: prepare alteplase while waiting for the historical clinic INR
options.zh: 一边等待既往门诊 INR，一边准备 alteplase

options.en: give aspirin immediately for secondary prevention
options.zh: 立即给予 aspirin 进行二级预防

correct.en: The case states a closed-world institutional protocol: IV alteplase is contraindicated when the INR exceeds 1.7 at intended administration. This client's current stat INR is 1.8, so the nurse should communicate that finding and support rapid CTA and thrombectomy evaluation rather than focusing on the clinic INR from five days ago or assuming a negative CT alone makes alteplase appropriate.
correct.zh: 本病例明确给出本机构流程：计划给药时 INR 超过 1.7 时禁用 IV alteplase。该患者当前急查 INR 为 1.8，因此护士应报告该结果并协助快速进行 CTA 和取栓评估，而不是依赖 5 天前的门诊 INR，或认为 CT 阴性本身就足以使用 alteplase。

byChoice.en: The eligibility conclusion is that IV alteplase is contraindicated under the stated institutional protocol because of the current INR.
byChoice.zh: 根据本机构流程，因当前 INR 超标，IV alteplase 的适用性结论是禁用。

byChoice.en: The decisive cue is the stat INR of 1.8, not the negative CT alone and not the historical clinic INR.
byChoice.zh: 决定性线索是急查 INR 1.8，而不是单纯 CT 阴性，也不是既往门诊 INR。

byChoice.en: Prompt communication allows the team to avoid delay and move to CTA and mechanical thrombectomy evaluation for a possible large-vessel occlusion.
byChoice.zh: 及时报告可避免延误，并让团队转向 CTA 和机械取栓评估，以处理可能的大血管闭塞。

testTakingStrategy.en: For thrombolysis questions, use the current point-of-care data at the time of the decision. A historical lab value may explain risk but does not replace the stat eligibility lab.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 做溶栓适用性题时，要使用决策当时的当前资料。既往化验可解释风险，但不能替代急查适用性化验。

glossary.defZh: 用于评估凝血时间的指标，warfarin 治疗时常用于监测抗凝强度。
根据时间窗、影像、血压、出血风险和实验室结果判断能否使用 IV alteplase。
患者最后一次被确认没有当前卒中症状的时间，是判断急性卒中治疗时间窗的基准。

questions.topic: Acute ischemic stroke thrombolysis and thrombectomy complications

stem.en: At Stage 1, which hypothesis best explains the client's presentation and guides the next diagnostic step?
stem.zh: 在阶段 1，哪一项假设最能解释患者表现并指导下一步诊断？

options.en: Acute ischemic stroke from a likely cardioembolic left MCA occlusion; proceed with CTA for thrombectomy evaluation
options.zh: 疑似心源性栓塞导致左侧 MCA 闭塞的急性缺血性卒中；进行 CTA 以评估取栓

options.en: Primary hypertensive encephalopathy; delay vascular imaging until BP is normal
options.zh: 原发性高血压脑病；等血压正常后再做血管成像

options.en: Lacunar stroke from chronic hypertension; no large-vessel imaging is needed
options.zh: 慢性高血压导致腔隙性卒中；不需要大血管成像

options.en: Hemorrhagic stroke; prepare anticoagulation reversal before further imaging
options.zh: 出血性卒中；进一步成像前先准备抗凝逆转

correct.en: The sudden onset, atrial fibrillation, aphasia, gaze preference, and dense right-sided deficits fit a large-vessel left MCA ischemic stroke, most likely cardioembolic. The initial CT excludes hemorrhage, and alteplase is excluded by the institutional INR criterion, so CTA for large-vessel occlusion and thrombectomy evaluation is the priority.
correct.zh: 突发起病、房颤、失语、凝视偏斜和严重右侧缺损符合大血管左侧 MCA 缺血性卒中，最可能为心源性栓塞。初始 CT 排除出血，而 alteplase 因本机构 INR 标准不符合，因此优先进行 CTA 评估大血管闭塞和取栓可能性。

byChoice.en: This option matches the vascular territory, mechanism, and next step after IV alteplase is excluded.
byChoice.zh: 该选项与供血区、发病机制和 IV alteplase 排除后的下一步相符。

byChoice.en: Hypertensive encephalopathy causes diffuse symptoms such as confusion, headache, or seizures, not a single left MCA cortical syndrome.
byChoice.zh: 高血压脑病通常导致弥漫性症状，如意识混乱、头痛或癫痫，而不是单一左侧 MCA 皮质综合征。

byChoice.en: Lacunar stroke usually lacks cortical signs such as aphasia and gaze preference; this client's NIHSS and cortical deficits suggest a large-vessel process.
byChoice.zh: 腔隙性卒中通常没有失语和凝视偏斜等皮质体征；该患者 NIHSS 和皮质缺损提示大血管病变。

byChoice.en: The non-contrast CT shows no hemorrhage at this stage, so hemorrhagic stroke is not the current working diagnosis.
byChoice.zh: 本阶段非增强 CT 未见出血，因此出血性卒中不是当前工作诊断。

testTakingStrategy.en: Cortical signs plus sudden onset in atrial fibrillation should make you think cardioembolic large-vessel occlusion, not just hypertension or a small-vessel stroke.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 房颤患者突发皮质体征时，应想到心源性栓塞性大血管闭塞，而不只是高血压或小血管卒中。

glossary.defZh: 来自心脏的血栓栓塞到脑血管导致的缺血性卒中。
小穿支动脉闭塞导致的小范围梗死，通常没有失语等皮质体征。
使用 CT 和造影剂评估血管狭窄或闭塞的检查。

questions.topic: Acute ischemic stroke thrombolysis and thrombectomy complications

stem.en: At Stage 2, the client is a thrombectomy candidate with BP 186/102 mmHg. Which nursing actions are appropriate before transfer to the neurointerventional suite? Select all that apply.
stem.zh: 在阶段 2，患者符合取栓条件，BP 为 186/102 mmHg。转入神经介入室前，哪些护理措施合适？选择所有适用项。

options.en: Start the prescribed IV nicardipine infusion and titrate per protocol toward the pre-thrombectomy BP threshold
options.zh: 开始医嘱的 IV nicardipine 输注，并按流程滴定至取栓前血压阈值

options.en: Maintain strict NPO status until a trained dysphagia screen is completed
options.zh: 在受训人员完成吞咽筛查前保持严格 NPO

options.en: Ensure two patent IV lines and continuous cardiac monitoring
options.zh: 确保两条通畅静脉通路并持续心电监护

options.en: Verify that proxy consent has been obtained because the client cannot provide informed consent due to aphasia
options.zh: 确认已由代理人同意，因为患者因失语无法提供知情同意

options.en: Administer oral antihypertensive medication with sips of water to lower the BP gradually
options.zh: 用少量水给予口服降压药，以逐渐降低血压

options.en: Request IV nitroprusside as the preferred first-line agent for rapid BP reduction
options.zh: 要求使用 IV nitroprusside 作为快速降压的一线首选药

correct.en: For a thrombectomy candidate, the nurse supports ordered titratable BP control, maintains NPO status because dysphagia risk has not been cleared, ensures IV access and monitoring, and confirms proxy consent when the neurologic deficit prevents informed consent. Oral intake before swallowing screening is unsafe. Nitroprusside is generally avoided as an initial first-line stroke BP agent because it can raise intracranial pressure and cause abrupt hypotension; the case order is nicardipine.
correct.zh: 对取栓候选者，护士应配合医嘱进行可滴定控压，因吞咽风险尚未排除而维持 NPO，确保静脉通路和监护，并在神经缺损妨碍知情同意时确认代理人同意。吞咽筛查前经口摄入不安全。Nitroprusside 通常不作为卒中初始一线降压药，因为可能升高颅内压并造成血压骤降；本病例医嘱为 nicardipine。

byChoice.en: Nicardipine is the ordered titratable infusion and directly addresses the pre-procedure BP goal.
byChoice.zh: Nicardipine 是医嘱的可滴定输注药，直接用于达到术前血压目标。

byChoice.en: Stroke clients are at risk for silent aspiration; nothing by mouth is given until dysphagia screening is completed.
byChoice.zh: 卒中患者有静默误吸风险；完成吞咽筛查前不可经口给予任何东西。

byChoice.en: Thrombectomy preparation requires reliable access and monitoring for arrhythmia, BP changes, and deterioration.
byChoice.zh: 取栓准备需要可靠通路和监护，以观察心律失常、血压变化和病情恶化。

byChoice.en: The client lacks decision-making capacity for this decision because of aphasia, so proxy consent is appropriate when required by the facility process.
byChoice.zh: 患者因失语无法为此项决策表达知情同意，因此按机构流程需要代理人同意。

byChoice.en: Oral medication or water before swallowing screening violates NPO safety and creates aspiration risk.
byChoice.zh: 吞咽筛查前给口服药或水违反 NPO 安全原则，会增加误吸风险。

byChoice.en: Nitroprusside is not the preferred initial first-line agent in this setting; the ordered agent is a titratable nicardipine infusion.
byChoice.zh: Nitroprusside 不是此情境的初始一线首选；医嘱药物是可滴定的 nicardipine 输注。

testTakingStrategy.en: When actions are concurrent before a procedure, avoid forcing a sequence. Select the actions that reduce immediate risk without delaying definitive reperfusion.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 术前多项措施可同时进行时，不要强行排序。选择能降低立即风险且不延误再灌注治疗的措施。

glossary.defZh: 可静脉滴定的钙通道阻滞剂，常用于急性神经系统情境下控制血压。
评估患者吞咽是否安全，以降低误吸风险的床旁筛查。
在患者无法决策时，按法律或文件授权替患者作医疗决定的人。

questions.topic: Acute ischemic stroke thrombolysis and thrombectomy complications

stem.en: At Stage 3, 45 minutes after neuro-ICU arrival, the client becomes drowsy, stops following commands, has no verbal output, and develops a new sluggish left pupil. Which actions should the nurse take immediately? Select all that apply.
stem.zh: 在阶段 3，到达神经 ICU 后 45 分钟，患者变得嗜睡、不再遵循指令、无语言输出，并出现新的左瞳孔对光反应迟钝。护士应立即采取哪些措施？选择所有适用项。

options.en: Notify the neurointerventionalist and neurology team stat
options.zh: 立即通知神经介入医师和神经科团队

options.en: Prepare for emergent non-contrast CT head
options.zh: 准备急诊头颅非增强 CT

options.en: Maintain airway patency and prepare for possible intubation
options.zh: 维持气道通畅，并准备可能的插管

options.en: Perform and document a rapid focused neurologic assessment compared with the post-procedure baseline
options.zh: 进行并记录快速重点神经评估，并与术后基线比较

options.en: Continue close BP monitoring while emergency treatment is initiated
options.zh: 启动急救处理的同时继续密切监测 BP

options.en: Let the client rest until the next scheduled neurologic check because fatigue is expected after the procedure
options.zh: 让患者休息到下一次计划神经检查，因为术后疲劳是预期表现

options.en: Focus first on the femoral access site as the most likely cause of the neurologic change
options.zh: 首先重点处理股动脉穿刺部位，因为它最可能导致神经变化

correct.en: Abrupt decline from an improving post-thrombectomy baseline, especially with new pupil asymmetry, is a neurologic emergency consistent with intracranial hemorrhage or mass effect until proven otherwise. The nurse should notify the team stat, prepare for emergent CT, protect the airway, rapidly document the neurologic change from baseline, and continue BP monitoring. Waiting for the next scheduled check or focusing on a clean groin site would delay care.
correct.zh: 患者在取栓后已改善的基线上突然恶化，尤其出现新的瞳孔不对称，应视为神经急症，按颅内出血或占位效应处理直到排除。护士应立即通知团队，准备急诊 CT，保护气道，快速记录与基线相比的神经变化，并继续监测 BP。等待下一次计划检查或把重点放在清洁无血肿的腹股沟穿刺部位会延误处理。

byChoice.en: Emergency notification mobilizes the clinicians who can order imaging, reversal, airway management, and neurosurgical escalation.
byChoice.zh: 紧急通知可调动能下达影像、逆转、气道处理和神经外科升级处置的团队。

byChoice.en: Non-contrast CT is the key rapid test to confirm or exclude intracranial hemorrhage after reperfusion.
byChoice.zh: 非增强 CT 是再灌注后快速确认或排除颅内出血的关键检查。

byChoice.en: Declining consciousness threatens airway protection and may require intubation.
byChoice.zh: 意识下降会威胁气道保护，可能需要插管。

byChoice.en: A focused comparison with the improved baseline documents severity and helps detect progression.
byChoice.zh: 与改善后的基线进行重点比较能记录严重程度，并帮助发现进展。

byChoice.en: Blood pressure can worsen hemorrhagic expansion and must be monitored closely during emergency treatment.
byChoice.zh: 血压可加重血肿扩大，急救处理期间必须密切监测。

byChoice.en: Somnolence with loss of speech and new pupil asymmetry is not expected fatigue and should not wait for the routine check schedule.
byChoice.zh: 嗜睡伴语言丧失和新的瞳孔不对称不是预期疲劳，不能等到常规检查时间。

byChoice.en: A groin bleed can be serious, but this client's signs are neurologic and the groin site is clean without hematoma or shock findings.
byChoice.zh: 腹股沟出血可能严重，但该患者表现为神经系统体征，穿刺部位清洁无血肿，也无休克表现。

testTakingStrategy.en: After reperfusion, compare every change to the most recent neurologic baseline. New decreased consciousness or pupil asymmetry is a red flag, not routine recovery.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 再灌注后，要把每个变化与最近的神经基线比较。新的意识下降或瞳孔不对称是危险信号，不是常规恢复过程。

glossary.defZh: 缺血性脑组织在再灌注或病情进展后发生出血。
出血或水肿压迫邻近脑组织，可导致中线移位和瞳孔改变。
用于评估睁眼、语言和运动反应的意识水平评分。

questions.topic: Acute ischemic stroke thrombolysis and thrombectomy complications

stem.en: At Stage 4, the CT confirms intracerebral hemorrhage with midline shift. The client is intubated, reversal is ordered, and nicardipine is being titrated to the provider's stat BP target. Which parameters are the priority bedside indicators of stabilization or continued deterioration? Select all that apply.
stem.zh: 在阶段 4，CT 确认脑实质内出血并有中线移位。患者已插管，已医嘱逆转抗凝，nicardipine 正在滴定至医师紧急血压目标。哪些参数是床旁判断稳定或继续恶化的优先指标？选择所有适用项。

options.en: Serial neurologic examination: GCS, pupil size/reactivity, and motor response
options.zh: 连续神经检查：GCS、瞳孔大小/反应和运动反应

options.en: Systolic BP trend and response to the nicardipine infusion
options.zh: 收缩压趋势及对 nicardipine 输注的反应

options.en: NIHSS score as the primary tool while the client is intubated and nonverbal
options.zh: 患者已插管且不能说话时，以 NIHSS 作为主要工具

options.en: Serial troponin levels because the initial rhythm was atrial fibrillation
options.zh: 因初始心律为房颤而连续监测肌钙蛋白

options.en: Appearance of the right groin dressing as the main marker of intracranial hemorrhage stability
options.zh: 以右腹股沟敷料外观作为颅内出血稳定性的主要指标

correct.en: In acute intracerebral hemorrhage with mass effect, the most actionable bedside indicators are serial neurologic status and BP response. Worsening GCS, fixed or enlarging pupil, or worsening motor response suggests expanding hematoma or rising ICP. Uncontrolled systolic BP can drive hematoma expansion, so response to the nicardipine target must be tracked. NIHSS is less useful in an intubated nonverbal client; troponin and the clean groin site do not evaluate the intracranial hemorrhage.
correct.zh: 急性脑实质内出血伴占位效应时，最有行动价值的床旁指标是连续神经状态和血压反应。GCS 恶化、瞳孔固定或扩大、运动反应恶化提示血肿扩大或 ICP 升高。收缩压控制不佳会推动血肿扩大，因此必须追踪对 nicardipine 目标的反应。NIHSS 对已插管、不能说话的患者用处较小；肌钙蛋白和清洁的腹股沟穿刺部位不能评估颅内出血。

byChoice.en: This is the most sensitive bedside trend for increasing ICP, hematoma expansion, and neurologic decline.
byChoice.zh: 这是床旁发现 ICP 升高、血肿扩大和神经恶化最敏感的趋势指标。

byChoice.en: The ordered BP goal is a modifiable factor; failure to achieve it requires escalation.
byChoice.zh: 医嘱血压目标是可干预因素；达不到目标需要升级处理。

byChoice.en: NIHSS was useful during the ischemic-stroke phase, but intubation and absent speech make it less reliable than GCS, pupils, and motor response for this ICH emergency.
byChoice.zh: NIHSS 在缺血性卒中阶段有用，但插管和无语言使其在此 ICH 急症中不如 GCS、瞳孔和运动反应可靠。

byChoice.en: Troponin may be relevant if acute coronary syndrome is suspected, but it does not indicate whether the intracranial hemorrhage is stabilizing.
byChoice.zh: 若怀疑急性冠脉综合征，肌钙蛋白可能相关，但它不能判断颅内出血是否稳定。

byChoice.en: Groin checks remain part of post-procedure care, but dressing appearance is not the main marker of intracranial hematoma stability.
byChoice.zh: 腹股沟检查仍是术后护理的一部分，但敷料外观不是颅内血肿稳定性的主要标志。

testTakingStrategy.en: For evaluation questions, choose parameters that change management in real time. In ICH, bedside neuro trends and BP control are more actionable than unrelated labs or earlier stroke scales.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 做评估结果题时，选择能实时改变处理的参数。ICH 中，床旁神经趋势和血压控制比无关化验或较早阶段使用的卒中量表更有行动价值。

glossary.defZh: 出血范围继续增加，可导致神经状态恶化和颅内压升高。
脑组织因出血或水肿受压而偏离正常中线位置。
颅腔内压力，升高时可导致意识下降、瞳孔改变和脑疝风险。

correct.en: The clinical arc is acute left MCA ischemic stroke in a client with atrial fibrillation and warfarin exposure. The initial nurse priorities are to recognize cortical stroke cues, use the current stat INR rather than a historical clinic INR when applying the facility alteplase protocol, and support rapid pivot to CTA and thrombectomy evaluation when IV alteplase is excluded. Before thrombectomy, nursing care focuses on ordered titratable BP control, NPO status, IV access, cardiac monitoring, documentation, and proxy consent. After successful reperfusion, sudden decline from an improving neurologic baseline with new ipsilateral pupil dilation is treated as intracranial hemorrhage until proven otherwise; the priority response is immediate team notification, emergent CT, airway readiness, BP control per order, and serial neurologic assessment. Once hemorrhage is confirmed, the nurse evaluates stabilization primarily through GCS/pupils/motor response and systolic BP response while supporting ordered reversal and neurosurgical management.
correct.zh: 本病例主线是房颤且使用 warfarin 的患者发生急性左侧 MCA 缺血性卒中。初始护理重点是识别皮质性卒中线索，按机构 alteplase 流程使用当前急查 INR 而不是既往门诊 INR，并在 IV alteplase 不符合条件时迅速转向 CTA 和机械取栓评估。取栓前护理聚焦于按医嘱可滴定控压、维持 NPO、确保静脉通路、心电监护、完成记录和代理同意。成功再灌注后，患者从改善中的神经基线突然恶化并出现同侧瞳孔扩大，应按颅内出血处理直到排除；优先反应是立即通知团队、急诊 CT、准备气道处理、按医嘱控压，以及连续神经评估。确认出血后，护士主要通过 GCS、瞳孔、运动反应和收缩压反应来评估是否稳定，同时配合医嘱逆转抗凝和神经外科处理。

testTakingStrategy.en: In unfolding stroke cases, separate time-sensitive eligibility data from background history, then compare each new neurologic finding with the most recent baseline.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 做逐步展开的卒中题时，先把有时间敏感性的适用性资料与背景病史分开，再把每一个新的神经发现与最近的基线进行比较。

glossary.defZh: 左侧大脑中动脉供血区发生缺血或梗死，可导致右侧无力、失语和凝视偏斜等表现。
一种静脉溶栓药，部分急性缺血性卒中患者在符合时间、影像和出血风险条件时可使用。
通过血管内介入方式取出大血管闭塞血栓的再灌注治疗。
脑组织内出血，可导致水肿、中线移位、意识下降和瞳孔改变。

claudeReviewFlags.issue: Current acute ischemic stroke thrombolysis guidance has changed in recent guideline updates; confirm the local protocol's INR cutoff and BP threshold before promotion.
claudeReviewFlags.reason: The learner-facing item frames INR >1.7 and pre-thrombectomy BP target as institutional protocol/order, but these thresholds were listed in reviewer currency notes and should be source-checked at the final promotion gate.

claudeReviewFlags.issue: Post-reperfusion hemorrhagic transformation BP target is framed as a provider stat order rather than a universal rule.
claudeReviewFlags.reason: The skeleton uses SBP below 140 mmHg; promotion review should confirm that this closed-world order is acceptable for the scenario and does not overstate generalized ICH guidance.

claudeReviewFlags.issue: Warfarin-associated intracranial hemorrhage reversal uses IV vitamin K plus four-factor PCC.
claudeReviewFlags.reason: This is carried from the skeleton and appears as an ordered treatment; verify against current local reversal protocol before canonical promotion.

questions.topic: Acute ischemic stroke thrombolysis and thrombectomy complications

stem.en: Complete the bow-tie for this Stage 4 situation: after successful left MCA thrombectomy, the client initially improved, then became somnolent with loss of verbal output and a new sluggish left pupil. Emergent CT shows a 3 cm left frontoparietal intraparenchymal hemorrhage with edema and 4 mm left-to-right midline shift. The client is intubated, warfarin reversal has been ordered, and nicardipine is being titrated to the provider's stat systolic BP target.
stem.zh: 完成此阶段 4 情境的 bow-tie：左侧 MCA 取栓成功后，患者最初改善，随后出现嗜睡、无语言输出，并出现新的左瞳孔对光反应迟钝。急诊 CT 显示左额顶叶脑实质内出血 3 cm，伴水肿和 4 mm 左向右中线移位。患者已插管，已医嘱逆转 warfarin，nicardipine 正在滴定至医师紧急收缩压目标。

tokens.zh: 再灌注后有症状性脑实质内出血

tokens.en: Re-occlusion of the left MCA after thrombectomy
tokens.zh: 取栓后左侧 MCA 再闭塞

tokens.en: Maintain serial neurologic assessments every 15 minutes, tracking GCS, pupils, and motor response
tokens.zh: 每 15 分钟持续神经评估，追踪 GCS、瞳孔和运动反应

tokens.en: Titrate nicardipine per order to maintain the prescribed systolic BP target
tokens.zh: 按医嘱滴定 nicardipine，以维持规定的收缩压目标

tokens.en: Administer aspirin or clopidogrel now for ischemic stroke secondary prevention
tokens.zh: 现在给予 aspirin 或 clopidogrel 进行缺血性卒中二级预防

tokens.en: Reduce neurologic checks to hourly because the client is intubated
tokens.zh: 因患者已插管，将神经检查减少为每小时一次

tokens.en: Neurologic examination: GCS, pupil size/reactivity, and motor response
tokens.zh: 神经检查：GCS、瞳孔大小/反应和运动反应

tokens.en: Systolic BP trend on the nicardipine infusion
tokens.zh: nicardipine 输注期间的收缩压趋势

tokens.en: NIHSS score as the main measure during intubated ICH management
tokens.zh: 插管后 ICH 处理中以 NIHSS 作为主要衡量指标

correct.en: The best synthesis is post-reperfusion symptomatic intracerebral hemorrhage because the client had initial improvement after successful thrombectomy, then abruptly developed decreased consciousness, loss of speech, and ipsilateral pupil dilation, and CT confirms hemorrhage with midline shift. The nurse's priority actions are frequent neurologic assessment and prescribed BP control because worsening examination or uncontrolled systolic BP can signal or worsen hematoma expansion. The priority parameters mirror those actions: GCS/pupils/motor response and systolic BP trend.
correct.zh: 最佳综合判断是再灌注后有症状性脑实质内出血，因为患者成功取栓后最初改善，随后突然出现意识下降、语言丧失和同侧瞳孔扩大，且 CT 确认出血并有中线移位。护士优先措施是频繁神经评估和按医嘱控压，因为神经检查恶化或收缩压控制不佳可能提示或加重血肿扩大。优先监测参数与这些措施对应：GCS/瞳孔/运动反应，以及收缩压趋势。

byChoice.en: This token matches the abrupt post-reperfusion decline and CT-confirmed hemorrhage with mass effect.
byChoice.zh: 该选项符合再灌注后突然恶化，以及 CT 确认出血并有占位效应。

byChoice.en: Re-occlusion would worsen ischemic deficits, but it does not explain the new pupil asymmetry and CT-confirmed intraparenchymal hemorrhage.
byChoice.zh: 再闭塞会加重缺血性缺损，但不能解释新的瞳孔不对称和 CT 确认的脑实质内出血。

byChoice.en: Sedation does not cause unilateral pupil dilation with midline shift on CT, and the client had been alert and improving before the abrupt decline.
byChoice.zh: 镇静不会导致单侧瞳孔扩大并在 CT 上出现中线移位，且患者恶化前曾清醒并在改善。

byChoice.en: Frequent serial neurologic checks detect hematoma expansion or rising ICP while the risk is highest.
byChoice.zh: 频繁连续神经检查能在风险最高时发现血肿扩大或 ICP 升高。

byChoice.en: BP control is a prescribed modifiable intervention to reduce risk of hematoma expansion and requires active nursing titration/monitoring.
byChoice.zh: 控压是医嘱的可干预措施，用于降低血肿扩大风险，需要护士主动滴定和监测。

byChoice.en: Antiplatelet therapy is unsafe during active intracranial bleeding; secondary prevention is deferred until the hemorrhage is stable and neurology reassesses.
byChoice.zh: 活动性颅内出血时抗血小板治疗不安全；二级预防需等出血稳定并由神经科重新评估。

byChoice.en: Intubation does not prevent assessment of pupils or motor response; reducing check frequency could miss early expansion.
byChoice.zh: 插管并不妨碍评估瞳孔或运动反应；减少检查频率可能漏掉早期扩大。

byChoice.en: GCS, pupils, and motor response are the most actionable bedside signs of worsening mass effect or stabilization.
byChoice.zh: GCS、瞳孔和运动反应是床旁判断占位效应恶化或稳定最有行动价值的指标。

byChoice.en: The systolic BP trend shows whether the ordered nicardipine strategy is achieving the target or needs escalation.
byChoice.zh: 收缩压趋势显示医嘱的 nicardipine 策略是否达到目标或需要升级处理。

byChoice.en: NIHSS is less useful once the client is intubated and nonverbal; GCS, pupils, and motor response are more appropriate for this ICH phase.
byChoice.zh: 患者插管且不能说话后，NIHSS 用处较小；此 ICH 阶段更适合用 GCS、瞳孔和运动反应。

byChoice.en: Troponin does not evaluate hematoma expansion or ICP in this neurologic deterioration scenario.
byChoice.zh: 肌钙蛋白不能评估此神经恶化情境中的血肿扩大或 ICP。

testTakingStrategy.en: For bow-tie items, first name the condition that explains all cues, then choose nursing actions and monitoring parameters that directly reduce or detect the highest-risk complication.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 做 bow-tie 题时，先确定能解释所有线索的病情，再选择能直接降低或发现最高风险并发症的护理措施和监测指标。

glossary.defZh: 闭塞血管恢复血流后发生的颅内出血，可能导致神经状态突然恶化。
颞叶内侧结构受压移位，可压迫动眼神经并导致同侧瞳孔扩大。

glossary.termZh: 四因子凝血酶原复合物
glossary.defZh: 含凝血因子 II、VII、IX、X 的制剂，常用于紧急逆转 warfarin 相关凝血障碍。
